features: Burn time of 25 hours of Glade fragrance
Floral Cherries with notes of juicy cherries, pink peony and white woods
Fragrance crafted by master perfumers and infused with essential oils and made without phthalates, parabens, formaldehydes
description: Product Description Our Floral Cherries Scented Candle captures the delicate blend of juicy cherries, pink peony and white woods, reminiscent of serene moments in blooming gardens and cherished times spent with loved ones. Let the Glade Floral Cherries candle bring a touch of elegance and freshness to your home, creating a soothing atmosphere where memories of beauty and tranquillity are cherished. Make it a getaway moment every time you infuse your space with the Floral Cherries scented candle. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Dispose of properly.
